lines: Morocco are absolutely cooking — four goals, zero fucks given — and Callum, Butters, Jim and Wilmot are all riding that wave like smug bastards at the top of the table.

Meanwhile Ellis is already having a mare: South Korea got spanked 1-0 by South Africa, Paraguay are third in Group D with nothing guaranteed, and Argentina are the only ones not embarrassing her so far — three teams in and one actual performance, well done you absolute fuck.

Dene's Bosnia smashed Jim's Qatar 3-1 yesterday, which means Jim's sitting on 1 point in Group B with Qatar essentially cooked — mate, you drew Qatar in a World Cup sweepstake and somehow it's still going worse than you expected.

Today's must-watch: The Foreman has BOTH Türkiye AND Curaçao playing today — Türkiye are pointless and facing the USA, while Curaçao get Côte d'Ivoire, so he could either have a miraculous double-header or spend the evening quietly reconsidering his life choices.

Also on today: Al's Netherlands face Callum and Dene's Tunisia in Group F — Tunisia are winless and pointless so far, meaning at least one of those two miserable cunts is about to feel slightly better or significantly worse by tonight.
